---
title: "03. 养生保真与技艺阈值"
subtitle: "Nourishing Life, Skill, and Fidelity Thresholds"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 3
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "Cook Ding's knife succeeds by minimizing damage while preserving structural fidelity; this is closest to rate-distortion and scan-error language, where finer resolution reduces destructive error. Fold..."
---

**Chapters:** 3, 19, 20  
**Omega Directions:** `rate-distortion-information-theory`, `fold-operator`, `zeckendorf-representation`

{{< include articles/category_03_nourishing_life_skillful_fidelity.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_03_nourishing_life_skillful_fidelity Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_03_nourishing_life_skillful_fidelity_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_03_nourishing_life_skillful_fidelity_video.mp4 >}}
